prompt: Clicking the button does nothing. What is the bug?
choices: Lambda expressions cannot be used as ActionListeners
The ActionListener is created but never passed to btn.addActionListener() — clicking the button fires no registered listeners
ActionListener must be registered before the JFrame is created
System.out.println cannot be called from inside an ActionListener
explanation: Creating an ActionListener object (or lambda) does not automatically attach it to any component. The button has no knowledge that this listener exists. Fix: btn.addActionListener(listener); — or inline: btn.addActionListener(e -> System.out.println("saved!"));
